news.title: Driver loses control, slams into tree off I-285
news.summary: A driver suffered serious injuries after a crash along Interstate 285 in Cobb County early Friday morning, according to police.

news.title: 1 person hospitalized, 1 detained after shooting in northwest Atlanta, police say
news.summary: The victim, whose identity was not released, was alert, breathing, and conscious and was taken to a local hospital for medical care.

news.title: 2 charged with murder after driver shot, crashes into Cobb apartment building
news.summary: Two have been arrested and charged with felony murder and aggravated assault in connection with a fatal shooting that occurred on June 30 at Stratford Ridge Apartments.

news.title: Police searching for man accused of shooting up Atlanta home
news.summary: Police in Atlanta are asking for the public’s help in identifying a person of interest in connection with a shooting.

news.title: Investigation ongoing after 2 males found dead in Webster County
news.summary: The Georgia Bureau of Investigation is investigating the deaths of two young men,19-year-old Zekevian James and 17-year-old Jo’Quavious Jones, following a missing persons search.

news.title: Sheriff: Teen suspects ‘blessed’ homeowner didn’t shoot back during car break-in
news.summary: Two teenage suspects are facing dozens of charges after investigators say a string of vehicle break-ins escalated into gunfire.

news.title: Guns could be shipped directly to homes under major rule change
news.summary: A new rule proposed by the Trump administration would allow the direct shipment of guns to buyer’s homes in what could be one of the biggest changes to gun regulations in recent history.

news.title: 'I'm drunk. It's okay': Gwinnett DUI arrest caught on video
news.summary: A Gwinnett County man is facing DUI-related charges after police say he admitted he was drunk following a crash.

news.title: Who stole a 7-foot eagle? Georgia deputies want answers
news.summary: A 7-foot-tall eagle statue weighing up to 200 pounds was stolen from a Catoosa County property.

news.title: Two charged after 19-year-old killed at Cobb apartments
news.summary: Two Marietta men have been arrested in connection with a fatal shooting at a Cobb County apartment complex.

news.title: Police investigating stabbing, crash that left one with life-threatening injuries in Stone Mountain
news.summary: The crash happened near the Planet Fitness on Memorial Drive and witnesses said there was a large police presence close by.

news.title: Tiffany Haddish's trial in 2022 Georgia DUI arrest set for next month
news.summary: The comedian was detained in Peachtree City on January 14, 2022, after police got a call around 2:30 a.m. regarding a driver asleep at the wheel on a highway.

news.title: 2 arrested, charged with murder in deadly shooting of teen at Marietta apartment complex: police
news.summary: Both men are charged with felony murder and aggravated assault and have been booked into the Cobb County Adult Detention Center.

news.title: Man in jail after alleged attempted armed robbery of Lawrenceville business
news.summary: The suspect entered a business and threatened a victim by claiming he had a bomb and a gun, while demanding cash.

news.title: Suspended Towns County sheriff arrested by GBI
news.summary: The GBI arrested suspended Towns County Sheriff Ken Henderson on multiple felony charges.

news.title: Officer must pay $21 million in case of Atlanta man who was paralyzed in fall after being tased
news.summary: The 11th Circuit Court of Appeals issued an opinion this week in the case of Jerry Blasingame, who passed away in 2023.
